creator: wghicks@bellsouth.net
text:
Coredumps SIGBUS on startup, 100% reproducible here and by others.

Fix: 

Deleting patch-ac from the patches directory of the port produces a
working Window Maker 0.20.2 for 2.2.7-STABLE.  This has been verified
on several different installations.
How-To-Repeat: /usr/X11R6/bin/wmaker
